top_strength: Exceptional rapport and budget-framing — proactively offered weekday pricing to save the customer money, earning a glowing 'you're well rated for a reason' response.
coaching_note: Save Your Ass was completely absent and the three differentiators (No Worries, Meet Your Mover, On-Time Guarantee) were all missed — highest-value trust builders on the call.
phone_presence_notes: Genuine warmth throughout — El Paso area code moment created authentic connection, and the customer's multiple compliments confirm Khevan left a strong impression.
